name: ioc-probe
description: IOC channel probe — maps CAN bus interface via /dev/ipc/ioc channels, captures IPC protocol data, dumps persistence addresses, and copies factory ESD files
author: dspl1236
architecture_notes: CAN bus path: PCM3Root → CGCANConnectionImpl → CHBIpcProtocol (0xFADE) → /dev/ipc/ioc/ch2,ch6,ch8 → FPGA → V850 → CAN
NDR (/dev/ndr) is for navigation/sensor data only — NOT CAN
IOC_CAN_TP1 is the UDS Transport Protocol service
All IOC channels ch2-ch10 are world-writable
ENCODER_BLOCK_IDs for CAN send: RESETBC, SET_TIME, PERSISTENCE_SETTING, PDC, RVC, COMPASS, etc.
DECODER_BLOCK_IDs for CAN recv: VEHICLE1, TRIP1/2, CONSUMPTION, HYBRID, DOOR_STATE, etc.
No SERVICE_RESET_ENCODER_BLOCK exists — Porsche excluded it
captures: Raw CAN data samples from ch2/ch6/ch8
Persistence address scan (service, cluster, vehicle ranges)
